title: geranium canariense
intro: Geranium canariense, also known as the Canary Islands geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Geranium canariense include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Geranium canariense can be found in essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used in aromatherapy and herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
